## Tags
backwards, reverse, slow, direction, south, download

## Categories
arrows, gaming, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/arrow-big-down-dash)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ArrowBigDownDash;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ArrowBigDownDash { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
